category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a Bash and zsh history suggest box; official GitHub README describes a shell history TUI for bash and zsh.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README title uses HSTR; source_facts.name is hstr.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README has Documentation, Configuration, and Tips sections/files.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/dvorka/hstr, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables indicate a command-line shell history tool; official GitHub topics include cli, bash, zsh, history, and command-history.
